success_factors: Workflow completed end-to-end with status=success across all nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize).
Import-first adapter strategy is appropriate for MONAI (import feasibility ~0.9, low intrusiveness risk).
Core MONAI surfaces were correctly identified (bundle scripts/config parser/inferers), enabling practical MCP wrapping.
Generated MCP service started healthy over stdio and passed plugin-level health checks.
failure_reasons: Quality gap: original project tests are marked failed/not executed despite reported 100% coverage metadata inconsistency.
Observability gap: per-node timing, LOC, file-size, and runtime resource metrics were not captured (reported as 0/unknown).
DeepWiki analysis failed, reducing external contextual validation.

node_performance.generation_time: Completed successfully; 7 MCP output files generated with broad endpoint list. Reported LOC/size = 0 indicates missing instrumentation rather than zero output.
node_performance.test_time: MCP plugin health passed; original project test stage flagged failed/empty. Test execution timing not recorded.
